narration: What if missing just ten days in the stock market cut your money in half? It sounds impossible — but the numbers are absolutely brutal.
visual: Animated stock chart line drawing across screen with dramatic dips and recoveries. Green dots mark the 10 best recovery days. Title: 'JUST 10 DAYS' in blue.

narration: Ten thousand dollars in the S&P 500 in 2004, left completely alone for twenty years, became $71,750. That's boring, patient money doing its thing.
visual: Large gold coin with dollar sign springs in. Counter animates from $10,000 to $71,750. Label: 'STAYED IN THE MARKET'. Light background.

narration: Same $10,000 — but this investor panicked during the scary parts and missed just the ten best trading days. Their ending balance? Only $32,871.
visual: Two vertical bars side by side: tall green bar ($71,750) vs short red bar ($32,871). Both animate up from zero. '$38,879 DIFFERENCE' label below.

narration: Here's the part that'll mess with your head — six of those ten best days happened within two weeks of the ten worst days. The biggest gains hide inside the biggest crashes.
visual: Timeline with red X marks for worst days and green circles for best days, shown clustered together. Text: '6 OF 10 BEST DAYS HIDE IN CRASHES'. Light background.

narration: Your brain sees a crash and screams get out. But by the time you run, you've missed the recovery. Fear doesn't protect your money — it steals it.
visual: Person silhouette running left away from a red downward crash arrow on the right. '$38,879 LOST TO PANIC' text in red springs in below.

narration: The move that beats almost every trader alive is boring: automate it, stop watching it, never panic-sell. Follow for more money moves they don't teach you.
visual: Three numbered steps animate in: 1 AUTOMATE IT, 2 STOP WATCHING, 3 NEVER PANIC-SELL. Rising green line chart below. Blue 'FOLLOW FOR MORE' button. Light background.
